MANOSABA-PEN_OF_HIRO.title: Hiro's Pen
MANOSABA-PEN_OF_HIRO.description:
At the start of each turn, if you have {VoteCost} [gold]Suspicion[/gold], consume [gold]Suspicion[/gold] to gain [gold]Summon[/gold]: {Summon}.
Upgrading increases the summon value.
MANOSABA-PEN_OF_HIRO.flavor: Exclusive to the mysterious perjury girl
MANOSABA-PHOTO_OF_THE_GREAT_WITCH.title: Photo of the Great Witch
MANOSABA-PHOTO_OF_THE_GREAT_WITCH.descri:
Gain {PotionSlots} additional potion slot(s).
At Lv2, whenever you procure a potion, 10% chance to gain a [gold]Catalyst[/gold] if you have an empty slot.
At Lv4, this chance becomes 20%.
MANOSABA-PHOTO_OF_THE_GREAT_WITCH.flavor: I miss you so much... Great Witch...
MANOSABA-SPRAY_CAN_OF_NOAH.title: Noah's Spray Can
MANOSABA-SPRAY_CAN_OF_NOAH.description:
Gain {OrbSlots} orb slots. Upgrades increase the number of slots.
From Lv2, at the start of your turn, randomly generate 1 paint orb.
From Lv4, generate 2 instead.
MANOSABA-FAIRY_HEART.title: Fairy Heart
MANOSABA-FAIRY_HEART.description:
At the start of your turn, lose all [gold]Majoka[/gold].
Whenever you are hit by an enemy attack, reduce that damage by 50% of your [gold]Strength[/gold] stacks.
MANOSABA-FAIRY_HEART.flavor: I've become the perfect detective Sherry! I definitely won't go Majoka again.
MANOSABA-CABINET_KEY.title: Small Key
MANOSABA-CABINET_KEY.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Suspicion[/gold] you have.
Then lose half of your current [gold]Suspicion[/gold].
MANOSABA-CABINET_KEY.flavor: What lock is this key for?
